emotional_tone: Authoritative, cutting-edge, transparent, and high-energy trust.

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-first, left-aligned text for paragraphs, asymmetrical tension in hero section.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used strictly for the sticky header and floating navigational elements.
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Apply to the VIP Pricing card to visually highlight it. A moving gradient line on the border.
visual_enhancers.marquee: Massive outline text (text-[10vw]) 'MENTOVA ACADEMY' running slowly in the background for kinetic texture.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain overlay on the darkest backgrounds to prevent digital flatness.

header.description: Sticky crystal glass header with Logo, Nav links, Language Switcher dropdown (EN/FR/ES), and Primary CTA. Z-index 50.

hero.description: Asymmetrical layout. Huge H1. Abstract 3D glowing network image as background with max bg-black/50 overlay. Clear CTA 'Download App' and a 'Founding Member' badge.

features_bento.description: Bento grid (Tetris Mode) for Atlas AI Mentor, Community, Interactive Charts, Verified Mentors. Use pure HTML/Tailwind to create overlapping grids.

atlas_ai_demo.description: Terminal/Retro-Futurism look. Deep black background, monospace data points, neon yellow accents. Minimalist layout emphasizing the 'Adaptive Learning' AI brain.

pricing_vip.description: Side-by-side cards. Free vs VIP. VIP card uses the Tracing Beam border effect, highlighted with yellow. Emphasize $9.99/mo founding price (vs $25.99 regular).

countdown_registration.description: Form section with strict Shadcn Inputs customized to flat dark mode. Includes a prominent countdown for 500 spots. Connected to backend API.

app_carousel.description: Framer-motion or CSS-based horizontal scroll showcasing app screenshots. Images max-h-[80vh] to prevent viewport takeover on mobile.

referral_program.description: Grid layout explaining the viral loop. Minimalist cards with Phosphor Icons.

founder_story.description: Editorial layout style. A large bold quote alongside the founder's portrait.

faq.description: Clean accordion list using Shadcn Accordion. High contrast typography.

footer.description: Massive top/bottom padding (py-32). Darkest background. Huge 'Mentova' text at the bottom. Legal links aligned bottom-right.

motion.animations: Framer Motion for entrance staggering (y: 20, opacity: 0). Hover states: -translate-y-1, text color shift, and shadow adjustments.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Never use pure transparent backgrounds under text overlaying images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

image_urls.description: Abstract glowing nodes representing Atlas AI and the crypto network. Use with bg-black/50 overlay.
Dark mode crypto trading desk to illustrate the interactive charts feature.
Computer screen showing charts, suitable for the carousel or app showcase.
Professional verified mentor (male) for the mentors section.
Professional verified mentor (female) for the mentors section.
Mentova founder story portrait in dark suit.

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: Codebase uses .js files, NOT .tsx files. Use standard React JSX inside .js files.
Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion react-fast-marquee @studio-freight/lenis lucide-react
Configure Tailwind with 'Unbounded' (Headings) and 'Chivo' (Body). Add custom color '#FACC15' for CTA.
Replace existing Purple/Green palette with the Archetype 4 Dark Mode (Obsidian Base, White Text, Warning Yellow CTA). Do not use #7351B7 or #1B93A4.
For the Bento Layouts, rely on raw HTML/Tailwind classes (grid, col-span) rather than rigid Shadcn Card components to maintain design freedom and asymmetry.
Implement the Pre-registration form using customized Shadcn inputs and prepare a mocked API fetch call that handles standard submission states (loading, success).
Build a kinetic marquee background (text-8xl, text-transparent, stroke-zinc-800) for the pricing or feature section using react-fast-marquee.
